description:
Analyze DNS query-response latency in the capture file '/home/ga/Documents/captures/dns.cap'. You need to produce a report file at '/home/ga/Documents/captures/dns_latency_report.txt' containing statistics about DNS resolution times.

The report MUST follow this EXACT format:

DNS Latency Profiling Report
=============================
Capture File: dns.cap
Total DNS Queries: <N>
Queries With Response: <N>
Unanswered Queries: <N>

Latency Statistics (ms):
  Minimum: <value>
  Maximum: <value>
  Mean: <value>
  Median: <value>

Slowest Resolution:
  Domain: <domain_name>
  Latency: <value> ms
